markdownRemark.html:
Flutter is Google’s UI toolkit for building beautiful, natively compiled applications for mobile, web, and desktop from a single codebase. If you appreciate the content 📖, support projects visibility, give 👍| ⭐| 👏

Articles

Introduction

  • Google IO 2018 - Building beautiful, flexible user interfaces.
  • Presentation - by Helio S. Junior.
  • Flutter Web - Ins and Outs of Flutter Web by Nash.

Websites / Blogs

  • Welcome to Flutter - English and French blog dedicated to providing practical solutions to most asked questions about Flutter by Didier Boelens.
  • SZAŁKO-BLOG - Step by step advanced design by Marcin Szalek.
  • Flutter by Example - Tutorials based on Redux, Firebase, Custom Animations, and UI.
  • Flutter Institute - Very original content and tutorials by Brian Armstrong.
  • Iirokrankka.com - Articles and tutorials and anything related by Iiro Krankka.
  • Norbert - In depth articles, features and app creation by Norbert515.
  • Flutter Tips - Articles, tips & tricks in the development by Diego Velásquez.
  • FilledStacks - Tutorials and guides on development by Dane Mackier.
  • Awesome Flutter tipsstars2.8k - Tips to help developers increase productivity by erluxman.

Tutorial

  • Animated Chat - Building beautiful UIs by Google Code Labs.
  • Firebase Chat - Firebase integration by Google Code Labs.
  • Planets-Flutter: from design to app - Detailed planets design tutorial.
  • Todo Liststars282 [259⭐] – Step by step tutorial how to build Todo List with Flutter by Andrei Lesnitsky
  • Flutter and Dart development - Articles and tutorials by Suragch.

Beginner

  • Roadmap to Flutter Developmentstars4.1k [2795⭐] - Visual roadmap with principles, patterns, and frameworks for Flutter newbies by Olexandr Leuschenko.
  • Layout Cheat Sheet - Extensive examples of layout widgets by Tomek Polański.
  • Getting Started with Flutter - by raywenderlich.com.
  • Beginner's Guidestars220 [123⭐] - Comprehensive guide to the basics of Flutter and Firebase by Anthony.

Intermediate

  • Flutter state management for minimalists - Understanding app architecture without relying on third-party frameworks by Suragch. See also State Management.

Advanced

  • Rendering Pipeline [799👍] and Let's build a render tree - Engine architecture by Adam Barth.
  • Render Objects - What are Widgets, RenderObjects and Elements? by Norbert515.
  • Streams and RxDart - Skillmatters presentation by Brian Egan.
  • Gesture System - Flutter Deep Dive: Gestures by Nash.
  • Schemas - Widget, State, Context and InheritedWidget explanations by Didier Boelens.
  • Rendering Engine Tutorial - Flutter's Rendering Engine: A Tutorial by AbdulRahman AlHamali.
  • Inherited Widget - Flutter’s InheritedWidget to hold app state by Chema Molins.
  • From Mobile to Desktop - Building applications for smartphones and desktops by Marcelo Henrique Neppel.
  • Accessibility widgets - Deep dive information about all aspects of accessibility by Muhammed Salih Güler.
  • Profiling w/ Timeline - Using the Timeline allows you to find and address specific performance issues in your application by Chinmay Garde.

Howtos

  • Parallax Effect - Parallax & non linear animation by Marcin Szalek.
  • Build Flavor - Define build configurations and switch them by Salvatore Giordano.
  • Build Flavor - Easily build flavors in Flutter (Android and iOS) with flutter_flavorizr by Angelo Cassano.

Videos

  • Boring Show - Exploration with the Flutter Team.
  • Tensor Programming [86🎬] - Very rich content by Tensor Programming.
  • Mtechviral [245🎬] - [Hindi/English] Mtechviral Series By Pawan Kumar.
  • Flutter in Practice - Free video courssd for beginners & non-programmers by Zaiste.
  • Whatsupcoders [82🎬] - Free video series on Flutter Widgets by Kamal.
  • Reso Coder - Intermediate and advanced videos by Matej Rešetár.

  • OneSignalstars546 [497⭐] - Push notification service by OneSignal.

  • App Ratingstars37 [30⭐] - Requesting and Writing Reviews for the App Store and Google Play by Rody Davis.

Frameworks

State management

Standard

  • Blocstars9.7k [8181⭐] - Collection of packages that help implement the BLoC design pattern by Felix Angelov.
  • MobXstars2.2k [2037⭐] - Supercharge the state-management in your apps with Transparent Functional Reactive Programming (TFRP). Port of MobX from the Js/React land.
  • Providerstars4.5k [3974⭐] - State-management library for Flutter by Remi Rousselet.
  • RiverPodstars3.6k [2214⭐] - Provider, but different by Remi Rousselet.
  • GetXstars7.6k - Contextless, State-management & navigation by Jonny Borges.
  • Binderstars171 [167⭐] - A lightweight, yet powerful way to bind your application state with your business logic, by Romain Rastel.

Redux / ELM / Dependency Injection

  • Built reduxstars81 [81⭐] - Automatic subscribing to your redux stores. Based on the built pattern by David Marne.
  • Redux.dartstars501 [486⭐] - Port of Redux to Dart with an ecosystem of middleware, Flutter integrations, and time traveling dev tools by John Ryan and Brian Egan.
  • Reduxstars1.6k [1522⭐] - Built to work with redux.dartstars501, utilities that allow you to easily consume a Redux Store to build Widgets.
  • Injectstars861 [847⭐] - Compile-time dependency injection by Google.
  • Fluxstars372 [368⭐] - Implementation of the Flux framework by Google.
  • Fishstars7.3k [7214⭐] - Alibaba Redux implementation.
  • Async Redux [199⭐] - Redux without boilerplate. Allows for both sync and async reducers by Marcelo Glasberg.

Widgets

  • Hooksstars2.5k [1965⭐] - Advanced code sharing between widgets by Remi Rousselet.
  • Functional widgetstars515 [435⭐] - Code generator writing widgets as functions with annotations by Remi Rousselet.

Data

  • Graphqlstars3k [2796⭐] - Implementation of the GraphQL spec by Zino App B.V..
  • GeoFlutterFirestars276 [244⭐] - Implementation of GeoFirestore for flutter by Darshan Gowda.
  • Ferrystars454 [334⭐] - Powerful & Extensible GraphQL Client by Sat Mandir Khalsa.

Backend

  • Dynamic Widgetstars1.3k [1100⭐] - Build your dynamic UI with json, and the json format is very similar with flutter widget code by Denny Deng.
  • NETCoreSyncstars64 - Centralized database synchronization framework for multiple clients, built on top of Moorstars1.7k library by Aldy J.
  • Parse for Flutter [394⭐] - Open source backend framework by ParsePlatform.

Animation

  • Sequence Animationstars378 [338⭐] - Composite staggered animations by Norbert Kozsir.
  • SpinKitstars2.6k [2405⭐] - Animated loading indicators by Jeremiah Ogbomo.
  • Villainsstars358 [328⭐] - Page transition animations by Norbert Kozsir.
  • AnimatedTextKitstars1.4k [1268⭐] - A collection of cool text animations by Ayush Agarwal.
  • Drawing Animationstars435 [384⭐] - Create drawing line animations based on SVG path data by Carl Hauck.
  • Simple Animationsstars848 - Create awesome custom animations easily by Felix Blaschke.
  • Flutter-animation-setstars272 [264⭐] - Easy to build an animation set by efoxTeam.
  • Staggered Animationsstars1.2k [977⭐] - Easily add staggered animations to your ListView, GridView, Column and Row by mobiten.
  • Animate Do - Animation package inspired in Animate.css by Fernando Herrera.
  • Funvasstars456 [361⭐] - Create fun time based canvas animations by creativecreatorormaybenot.

Testing

  • Flutter Gherkinstars180 [150⭐] - Fully featured Gherkin parser and UI automated test runner by Jon Samwell.

Web

  • Responsive Frameworkstars876 [702⭐] - Automatically adapt UI to different screen sizes. Responsiveness made simple by Codelessly.

Experimental

This section contains libraries that take an experimental or unorthodox approach.

  • styled_widgetstars916 [671⭐] - Simplifying your widget tree structure by defining widgets using methods by Rein Gundersen Bentdal.

Engines

Rendering

  • Graphxstars363 [293⭐] - Making drawings and animations extremely simple, inspired by Flash, by Roi Peker.

Game

  • Flamestars7k [5173⭐] - Minimalist game engine by Luan Nico.
  • SpriteWidgetstars1.2k [1186⭐] - Toolkit for building complex, high performance animations and 2D games by Viktor Lidholt.

Open source games

  • Flipstars238 [201⭐] - Reversi game by Andrew Brogdon.
  • 2048stars255 [205⭐] - 2048 game by Anuran Barman.
  • TRexstars0 [316⭐] - Port of the famous Chrome's Trex game by Renan C. Araújo.
  • Crushstars471 [409⭐] - How to build a Math-3 game, like Candy Crush, Bejeweled by Didier Boelens.
  • Slide Puzzlestars175 [152⭐] - Classic slide (15) puzzle by Kevin Moore.
  • Tetrisstars1.4k [1280⭐] - Tetris game by YangBin.
  • Party Charadesstars178 [165⭐] - Party charades by Kamil Rykowski.
  • Ghost Riggerstars181 [159⭐] - Ghost Rigger is a cyberpunk inspired puzzle game by Iain Smith and Julio Ernesto Rodríguez Cabañas.
  • Space Empiresstars60 [32⭐] - A 4X Space themed strategy game by Satyam Sharma.

Game Engine resources

  • Awesome Flamestars599 - Curated list of the best Flame games, projects, libraries, tools, tutorials, articles and more by Flame Engine.

Open Source Apps

Premium

  • History Of Everythingstars6.2k [5887⭐] - Animated vertical timeline of humanity by 2D, Inc.
  • Developer Queststars3k [2917⭐] - Become a tech lead, slay bugs by 2D, Inc.
  • AppFlowystars28.3k [12156⭐] - The Open Source Notion Alternative. You are in charge of your data and customizations. Built with Flutter and Rust by AppFlowy team.

Top

  • Flutter Team Samplesstars13.6k [10919⭐] - Collection of examples (including maps, json, Material and Cupertino) by the Flutter team.
  • Flutter Common Widgetsstars23.2k [22910⭐] - Collection of official widgets demos & docs in chinese to help developers learn quickly by Alibaba Auction Frontend Team.
  • Meme Chatstars524 [514⭐] - Chat app on Flutter, using Firebase, Google Sign In, and device camera integration by a team of Googlers.
  • Flitterstars189 [183⭐] - Glitter app by Hadrien Lejard and Kevin Segaud. It uses Redux and Jaguar.
  • Limestars373 [356⭐] - Lime social network by Sebastian Sellmair.
  • Planetsstars748 [711⭐] - Planet exploration that demonstrate rich UI by Sergi Martínez.
  • NewsBuzzstars537 [505⭐] - Firebase backed news reader using News API by Ankur Kedia.
  • DroidKaigi2018-flutterstars514 [513⭐] - Unofficial conference app for DroidKaigi 2018 Tokyo by konifar.
  • Music Playerstars1.5k [1332⭐] - Full featured music player by Pawan Kumar.
  • WhatTodostars973 [910⭐] - Todoist like UI by Burhanuddin Rashid.
  • FlutterGramstars2.1k [1939⭐] - Complete Instagram based on Firestore & Google Functions by MDanics.
  • BookSearchstars503 [472⭐] - Digital BookShelf for your reading progress by Norbert515.
  • Cinematicstars859 [832⭐] - UI for Movie DB Public API by Aaron Oertel.
  • Beer-Me-Upstars468 [441⭐] - Beer tracking nicely designed by Benoit Letondor.
  • Tracestars935 [789⭐] - Modern and powerful crypto portfolio & market explorer by Trent Piercy.
  • Taskiststars793 [729⭐] - Taskist is a ToDo List app for Task Management by Hugo EXTRAT.
  • Tourismstars273 [251⭐] - Tourism app based on redux w/ animations & i18n by blueMixstars273.
  • Trinity Orientation @ Univ Torontostars599 [562⭐] - Orientation week at Trinity College, U of T by Matthew Tory.
  • Transform Widgetstars28 - Image widgets as 3D game engine sprites by Paul Thomas.
  • Deerstars338 [297⭐] - Minimalist Todo Planner built using BLoC pattern by Aleksander Woźniak.
  • TailorMadestars269 [235⭐] - Managing a Fashion designer's daily routine using a mixture of ReBLoC w/ Firebase Cloud Store & Functions by Jeremiah Ogbomo.
  • Instorystars205 [194⭐] - Instgram story downloader with a beautiful UI Sarath.
  • Spacex-Gostars750 [645⭐] - Simple yet powerful, open-source SpaceX launch tracker. jesusrp98.
  • Superhero Interactionstars218 [218⭐] - Cool Superhero interaction animation by Pinkesh Darji.
  • Replystars563 [535⭐] - 'Reply' Material Design case study by Frederik Schweiger.
  • Enigmastars386 - Privacy chat with end-to-end encryption by AmitJoki.
  • Chillifystars568 - Fancy music app made with Provider and Bloc pattern by Karim Elghamry.
  • Pokedexstars1.7k - Pokedex app with beautiful UI and smooth animation by Hung Pham.
  • Timy Messengerstars1.8k [1742⭐] - Group messaging app with a focus on organizing events by Miguel Beltran and Franz Heinfling.
  • GitJournalstars2.7k [1717⭐] - Journaling your data in a Git Repo by Vishesh Handa.
  • AuthPassstars1.4k [1061⭐] - Keepass compatible password manager for mobile and desktop by hpoul.
  • Fwitterstars2k [1523⭐] - Full Twitter clone using Firebase solution by Sonu Sharma.
  • Harpystars1.6k [825⭐] - Feature rich Twitter client by Roberto Doering.

Utilities

  • Launcher Iconsstars1.6k - Generate your launcher icons easily by Mark O'Sullivan and Franz Silva.
  • FlutterIcon [310⭐] - Icon set generator by Mike Hoolehan.
  • FVMstars3k [2233⭐] - Flutter Version Management: A simple cli to manage Flutter SDK versions.
  • Environment Configurationstars87 [86⭐] - CLI tool to generate .env configurations for application environments by TatsuUkraine.
  • Flutter Flavorizrstars250 [160⭐] - CLI utility to easily generate flavors for Android and iOS in less than 3 minutes by Angelo Cassano.
  • Fontifystars86 [77⭐] - CLI tool to convert SVG icons to OTF font and generate Flutter-compatible class by Igor Kharakhordin.
  • FlutterGenstars1.1k [791⭐] - Assets code generator for your images, fonts, colors, etc — Get rid of String-based APIs.
  • Very Good Clistars1.7k [1135⭐] - Very Good Command Line Interface for Dart created by Very Good Ventures.
  • Flutter Sidekickstars1k [544⭐] - Simple app to make Flutter development more delightful by Leo Farias.
  • Dart Code Metricsstars700 [430⭐] - Additional linter which reports code metrics, checks for anti-patterns and provides additional rules for the Dart analyzer by Dart Code Checker team.

VSCode

  • Awesome Snippets - Collection of commonly used classes and methods by Nash.
  • Flutter Files - Quick generation for BLoC templates files by context menu by Gorniv.
  • Flutter Intl - i18n binding from arb files by Localizely.

IntelliJ / Android Studio

  • Enhancement_Suitestars239 [196⭐] - Search for pub.dev libraries, update version, Bloc, Snippet, etc you're covered by Marius Höfler.
  • Flutter Intl - 18n binding from arb files by Localizely.

Desktop

  • Desktop Embeddingstars7.1k [6950⭐] - Desktop implementations of the Flutter embedding API by Google.
  • Golang Desktop Embedderstars5.4k [5083⭐] - Golang embedder for desktop by Pierre Champion.
  • Native Shellstars539 [372⭐] - Experimental embedder for Flutter by Matej Knopp.
  • Rust Desktop Embedderstars2k [1871⭐] - Rust embedder for desktop by juju.
  • bitsdojo_windowstars578 - Customize windows owner-drawn chrome by BitsDojo.
  • Raspberry Pi Embedderstars1k [747⭐] - Light-weight Embedder for Raspberry Pi by Hannes Winkler.
  • Fluent UIstars1.7k [566⭐] - Microsoft's Fluent Design System in Flutter by Bruno D'Luka.
  • MacOS UIstars1k [492⭐] - Widgets and themes implementing the current macOS design language by Groovin Chip.
  • Ubuntu Yarustars212 [134⭐] - Distinct look and feel of the Ubuntu Desktop by Ubuntu.
  • Awesome Flutter Desktopstars971 [516⭐] - A curated list of awesome things related to Flutter desktop by LeanFlutter.

Books

Learning Flutter - Beginners

  • Beginning App Development - by Rap Payne.
  • Beginning Flutter - by Marco Napoli.
  • Flutter for Beginners - by Alessandro Biessek.
  • Flutter in Action - by Eric Windmill.
  • Learn Google Flutter Fast - by Mark Clow.

Cookbooks

  • Practical Flutter - by Frank Zammetti.

Podcasts

English

  • It's all widgets! Flutter podcast - by Hillel Coren.

Portuguese

  • Universo Flutter - by Matias de Andrea.

Spanish

  • Código Flutter - by Guillermo García.

Russian

  • Flutter Dev Podcast - by Eugene Saturov.

Bonus

  • It's All Widgets! - Open list of published apps by Hillel Coren, Thomas Burkhart, Simon Lightfoot and Scott Stoll.
  • Awesome Flutter Linuxstars101 - A curated list of awesome Linux-specific Flutter packages and projects by J-P Nurmi.

Fun

  • The One [444👍]

Hardware

  • Matrix2stars20 - Sense Hat's LED matrix control game by bus710.

Guide & Interviews

  • Interview Questionsstars320 - List of helpful questions you can use to interview potential candidates by Whatsupcodersstars41.
  • The International Flutter Starter Kit - Guide by the experts by Beyza Sunay Guler & Nawal Alhamwi.

Community

Presentation material

Communication

  • r/FlutterDev - Reddit community by u/JaapVermeulen.

  • OpenFlutter - Make it easier 让 Flutter 更简单.
  • Hashnode - Read and write posts, participate in discussions or ask questions.

Misc

  • Flutter Events - Open list of Flutter events by @hillelcoren.
  • FlutterX - Searchable list of resources by Hillel Coren.
